info.title: InsightFlare API
info.description:
InsightFlare is a privacy-focused web analytics platform. This API allows
programmatic management of sites and retrieval of analytics data.

## Authentication

All `/api/v1/` endpoints require an API key passed via the `Authorization` header:

```
Authorization: Bearer ifk_live_<prefix>.<secret>
```

API keys are scoped with granular permissions:
- `site:read` / `site:write` ã manage sites
- `site_config:read` / `site_config:write` ã manage site tracking config
- `analytics:read` ã query analytics data

Keys can also be restricted to specific site IDs within a team.

## Response Envelope

All responses follow a standard envelope:

**Success:**
```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "requestId": "a1111697fbf911e8",
  "timestamp": "2026-06-25T12:00:00.000Z",
  "data": { ... }
}
```

**Error:**
```json
{
  "ok": false,
  "requestId": "a1111697fbf911e8",
  "timestamp": "2026-06-25T12:00:00.000Z",
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_api_key",
    "message": "The provided API key is invalid or has been revoked."
  }
}
```

`requestId` is derived from the Cloudflare Ray ID and can be used for
debugging by referencing server-side logs.

## Timestamps

All timestamps in query parameters (`from`, `to`) are **Unix milliseconds**.
Timestamps in response objects are **Unix seconds** unless the field name
contains `Ms` (e.g. `timestampMs`), in which case they are milliseconds.

tags.name: Sites
tags.description: Create, read, update, and delete analytics sites

tags.name: Site Config
tags.description: Manage site tracking configuration and embed snippets

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: Query analytics data and team dashboards

get.description:
Returns service health status. No authentication required.
Response includes binding status for KV, D1, and Durable Objects.

post.description:
Ingests a tracking event from the InsightFlare client SDK.
Always returns 204 regardless of whether the event was accepted.
Bots are silently dropped. Events are validated against site config
(domain whitelist, path blacklist) before forwarding to the ingestion pipeline.

CORS: reflects the request origin with `Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true`.

204.description: Event accepted (always returned, even if dropped)

get.description: Returns all sites accessible by the authenticated API key within its team.

post.description:
Creates a new site within the API key's team.
Requires full site access (key must not be restricted to specific sites).

get.description: Returns a single site by ID. The API key must have access to this site.

patch.description: Updates site fields. Only provided fields are changed; omitted fields retain their current value.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a site and all associated data.

get.description: Returns the tracking script configuration for a site.

patch.description:
Updates the tracking script configuration for a site.
Only provided fields are changed; omitted fields retain their current value.

get.description: Returns the HTML snippet to embed the tracking script on a website.

src.description: Full URL to the tracking script

parameters.name: queryName
parameters.description:
Analytics query name. Queries are grouped by category:

**Overview** ã `overview`, `trend`, `filter-options`,
`overview-page-path|title|hostname|entry|exit`,
`overview-source-domain|link`,
`overview-client-browser|os-version|device-type|language|screen-size`,
`overview-geo-country|region|city|continent|timezone|organization|points`

**Content** ã `pages`, `pages-dashboard`, `referrers`, `page-hash`, `page-query`

**Events** ã `event-types`, `events-summary`, `events-trend`, `events-records`,
`event-type-detail`, `event-type-field-values`, `event-record-detail`

**Visitors & Sessions** ã `visitors`, `sessions`, `visitor-detail`, `session-detail`

**Retention** ã `retention`

**Performance** ã `performance`

**Technology** ã `browser-trend`, `browser-engine-trend`, `browser-version-breakdown`,
`browser-cross-breakdown`, `browser-radar`, `referrer-radar`,
`referrer-dimension-trend`, `client-dimension-trend`, `utm-dimension-trend`,
`client-cross-breakdown`

**UTM & Geo** ã `utm-source`, `utm-medium`, `utm-campaign`, `utm-term`, `utm-content`,
`countries`

**Funnels** ã `funnels` (also supports POST and DELETE)

get.description:
Executes an analytics query for the specified site.

### Common parameters (all queries)
| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `from` | integer | Start timestamp (Unix ms) |
| `to` | integer | End timestamp (Unix ms) |
| `interval` | enum | `minute`, `hour`, `day`, `week`, `month` |
| `timeZone` / `tz` | string | IANA timezone (e.g. `America/New_York`) |

### Dashboard filter parameters (most queries)
| Parameter | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `country` | Filter by country code |
| `device` | Filter by device type |
| `browser` | Filter by browser name |
| `path` | Filter by page pathname |
| `query` | Filter by query string |
| `title` | Filter by page title |
| `hostname` | Filter by hostname |
| `entry` | Filter by session entry page |
| `exit` | Filter by session exit page |
| `sourceDomain` | Filter by referrer domain |
| `sourceLink` | Filter by referrer URL |
| `clientBrowser` | Filter by browser |
| `clientOsVersion` | Filter by OS version |
| `clientDeviceType` | Filter by device type |
| `clientLanguage` | Filter by language |
| `clientScreenSize` | Filter by screen size |
| `geo` / `geoCountry` | Filter by country |
| `geoRegion` | Filter by region |
| `geoCity` | Filter by city |
| `geoContinent` | Filter by continent |
| `geoTimezone` | Filter by timezone |
| `geoOrganization` | Filter by ISP/organization |

### Query-specific parameters
| Query | Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `overview` | `includeChange` | boolean | false | Include previous period data and change rates |
| `overview` | `includeDetail` | boolean | false | Include trend detail in response |
| `pages` | `details` | boolean | false | Include query/hash breakdowns |
| `referrers` | `fullUrl` | boolean | false | Show full referrer URLs |
| `pages-dashboard` | `page` | integer | 1 | Page number (1-indexed) |
| `pages-dashboard` | `pageSize` | integer | 12 | Results per page (1-24) |
| `visitors` | `page` | integer | 1 | Page number |
| `visitors` | `pageSize` | integer | 50 | Results per page (1-120) |
| `visitors` | `sortBy` | enum | firstSeenAt | `firstSeenAt`, `lastSeenAt`, `sessions`, `views` |
| `visitors` | `sortDir` | enum | desc | `asc`, `desc` |
| `visitors` | `search` / `q` | string | | Search visitor ID |
| `sessions` | `page` | integer | 1 | Page number |
| `sessions` | `pageSize` | integer | 50 | Results per page (1-120) |
| `sessions` | `sortBy` | enum | startedAt | `startedAt`, `durationMs`, `views` |
| `sessions` | `sortDir` | enum | desc | `asc`, `desc` |
| `sessions` | `search` / `q` | string | | Search session ID |
| `visitor-detail` | `visitorId` | string | **required** | Visitor UUID |
| `session-detail` | `sessionId` | string | **required** | Session UUID |
| `events-trend` | `eventName` | string | | Filter by event name |
| `events-trend` | `limit` | integer | 8 | Max series (1-12) |
| `events-records` | `page` | integer | 1 | Page number |
| `events-records` | `pageSize` | integer | 50 | Results per page (1-120) |
| `events-records` | `sortBy` | enum | occurredAt | `occurredAt`, `eventName`, `pathname` |
| `events-records` | `sortDir` | enum | desc | `asc`, `desc` |
| `events-records` | `search` / `q` | string | | Search event ID |
| `events-records` | `eventName` | string | | Filter by event name |
| `event-type-detail` | `eventName` | string | **required** | Event type name |
| `event-type-field-values` | `eventName` | string | **required** | Event type name |
| `event-type-field-values` | `fieldPath` | string | **required** | Dot-notation field path |
| `event-type-field-values` | `fieldValueType` | enum | **required** | `string`, `number`, `boolean`, `null`, `object`, `array` |
| `event-type-field-values` | `limit` | integer | 50 | Max results |
| `event-record-detail` | `eventId` | string | **required** | Event UUID |
| `funnels` | `id` | string | | Funnel UUID (omit to list all) |
| `retention` | `granularity` | enum | week | `minute`, `hour`, `day`, `week`, `month` |
| `browser-trend` | `limit` | integer | 5 | Max series (1-12) |
| `browser-engine-trend` | `limit` | integer | 5 | Max series (1-8) |
| `browser-version-breakdown` | `browserLimit` | integer | 5 | Max browsers (1-8) |
| `browser-version-breakdown` | `versionLimit` | integer | 5 | Max versions per browser (1-8) |
| `browser-cross-breakdown` | `browserLimit` | integer | 8 | Max browsers (1-12) |
| `browser-cross-breakdown` | `osLimit` | integer | 6 | Max OS (1-8) |
| `browser-cross-breakdown` | `deviceTypeLimit` | integer | 5 | Max device types (1-8) |
| `referrer-radar` | `limit` | integer | 24 | Max referrers (1-48) |
| `referrer-dimension-trend` | `limit` | integer | 5 | Max series (1-8) |
| `client-dimension-trend` | `dimension` | enum | **required** | `browser`, `operatingSystem`, `osVersion`, `deviceType`, `language`, `screenSize` |
| `client-dimension-trend` | `limit` | integer | 5 | Max series (1-8) |
| `utm-dimension-trend` | `dimension` | enum | **required** | `source`, `medium`, `campaign`, `term`, `content` |
| `utm-dimension-trend` | `limit` | integer | 5 | Max series (1-8) |
| `client-cross-breakdown` | `primaryDimension` | enum | **required** | Any client dimension |
| `client-cross-breakdown` | `secondaryDimension` | enum | **required** | Must differ from primary |
| `client-cross-breakdown` | `primaryLimit` | integer | 5 | Max primary values (1-12) |
| `client-cross-breakdown` | `secondaryLimit` | integer | 6 | Max secondary values (1-8) |
| `filter-options` | `filterKey` | string | **required** | Dashboard filter key |
| `overview-geo-points` | `applyGeoFilter` | boolean | false | Apply current geo filters |
| `overview-geo-points` | `limit` | integer | 5000 | Max points (1-20000) |

parameters.name: eventName
parameters.description: Filter by event name (events-trend, events-records, event-type-detail, event-type-field-values)

post.description:
Creates a new funnel definition. Only available for the `funnels` queryName.
Steps must be ordered and each step has a `type` (pageview or event) and a `value`.

delete.description:
Deletes a funnel definition. Pass the funnel `id` as a query parameter.
Only available for the `funnels` queryName.

get.description:
Returns an aggregated dashboard for the API key's team, including
per-site summaries, change rates, and trend data broken down by site.

BearerAuth.description:
API key in the format `ifk_live_<prefix>.<secret>`.
Generate keys from the InsightFlare dashboard under Settings > API Keys.

requestId.description: Cloudflare Ray ID for request tracing

message.example: The provided API key is invalid or has been revoked.

SiteConfig.description: Tracking script configuration. All fields are optional on update.

trackingStrength.description: Controls EU privacy mode. strong = never use EU mode, weak = always EU mode, smart = auto-detect from Cloudflare country header

trackQueryParams.description: Include URL query parameters in tracked page paths

trackHash.description: Include URL hash fragments in tracked page paths

domainWhitelist.description: Additional allowed hostnames beyond the site's own domain

pathBlacklist.description: URL paths to exclude from tracking (prefix match)

ignoreDoNotTrack.description: Track visitors even if their browser sends DNT header

performanceSampleRate.description: Percentage of sessions that collect Core Web Vitals (0 = disabled)

SiteConfigUpdateInput.description: Partial update for site tracking configuration. Only provided fields are changed.

TrackerClientPayload.description: Tracking event payload sent by the client SDK

AnalyticsResponse.description: Analytics query response. The `data` shape varies by queryName.

returned.description: Number of results in this page

nextPage.description: Next page number, or null if no more pages

TrendRow.description: A single time bucket in a trend series

timestampMs.description: Bucket timestamp (Unix ms, alias for bucket)

DimensionRow.description: A row in a dimension breakdown (pages, countries, UTM, etc.)

PerformanceSummaryStats.description: Statistical summary for a single Core Web Vital metric

PerformanceSummaryRow.description: Performance summary with all five Core Web Vitals

PerformanceTrendRow.description: Performance metric value for a single time bucket

ShareTrendSeriesEntry.description: A series in a share trend chart

isOther.description: Present and true for the aggregated "other" series

ShareTrendDataPoint.description: A single time bucket in a share trend

visitorsBySeries.description: Map of series key to visitor count

RadarEntry.description: Browser or referrer radar entry with normalized metrics (0-1)

type.description: pageview = match pathname, event = match event name

value.description: Pathname pattern or event name to match

FunnelAnalysisStep.description: Analysis result for a single funnel step

JourneyPerformanceSummary.description: Per-metric statistical summary (avg, p75, min, max, samples)

TooManyRequests.description: Rate limit exceeded (not currently enforced, reserved for future use)

error.message: Too many requests, please try again later
